name: start_new_agent
description: Starting a new agent transitions CREATED -> ACTIVE

name: pause_active_agent
description: Pausing an active agent transitions ACTIVE -> AWAITING

name: resume_paused_agent
description: Starting an AWAITING agent transitions AWAITING -> ACTIVE
setup: lifecycle-manager.sh start test-agent && lifecycle-manager.sh pause test-agent

name: complete_active_agent
description: Completing an active agent transitions ACTIVE -> COMPLETED

name: fail_active_agent
description: Failing an active agent transitions to FAILED

name: cancel_active_agent
description: Cancelling an active agent transitions to CANCELLED

name: cannot_complete_cancelled
setup: lifecycle-manager.sh start test-agent && lifecycle-manager.sh cancel test-agent

name: list_shows_agents
description: List subcommand displays all tracked agents
setup: lifecycle-manager.sh start agent-1 && lifecycle-manager.sh start agent-2

name: events_logged_ndjson
description: State transitions emit NDJSON events to lifecycle.json
assert: lifecycle.json contains JSON line with agent_id and from/to states
